prompt:
Portrait shot on 85mm f/1.8, medium close-up of a Japanese woman in her mid-20s, dark hair in loose low bun with many stray pieces, natural dark brows, eyes with slight redness as if from crying or cold air, expressionless face with direct tired gaze at lens. She wears a dark navy ribbed turtleneck.

Upper body portrait outdoors, autumn park or riverside setting, fallen leaves bokeh in background and foreground, shallow depth of field.

Cool overcast autumn outdoor light, desaturated olive and brown tones, slight blue cast overall, flat diffused light from above.

Photographic texture and quality: Fuji Classic Chrome rendering, muted olive greens and faded browns, ISO 400 film grain, skin with natural cold-weather texture, stray hairs from loose bun, not geometrically perfect.

Avoid: warm autumn colors, bright light, neat hair.

--ar 4:5
